codomain_status.running_route_required: U_QED^{S_pole_to_S_run}(alpha, mu, thresholds, loop_order, convention, Sigma_QED)

gate_status.G1_CODOMAIN_DECLARED: pass for pole; typed for running
gate_status.G2_TRANSPORT_MAP: pass for pole v43 map; formal/open for running U_QED
gate_status.G3_CONSTANTS_LEDGER: pass for APF count ledger; QED external ledger open for running
gate_status.G4_COVARIANCE: pass as APF envelope admission for pole residual band; numeric trace/QED covariance open
gate_status.G5_NO_SMUGGLING: pass: envelope not derived from targets, no fitted running convention
gate_status.G6_RESIDUAL_CHANNELS: pass: residual assigned to APF envelope; running residual deferred to named U_QED/Sigma_QED channels

promotion.before: charged leptons: P_export_candidate^pole_LO + C_scalar_normalized^APF_count_witness / covariance and running codomain open

still_open.QED_running_transport: explicit U_QED map with scheme, scale, loop order, thresholds, and convention
still_open.numeric_trace_covariance: Sigma_l or certified trace tolerance source
still_open.external_QED_constants_ledger: alpha, thresholds, and covariance if running masses are claimed
